error_signature: OAuth2 connection will request the scope (w_organization_social)
title: LinkedIn OAuth2 scope permission issue
symptom: The LinkedIn OAuth2 connection fails due to missing permissions for the 'w_organization_social' scope, preventing posting as an organization.
applies_when: Attempting to post as an organization
not_this_if: The app has the required permissions for the scope
root_cause: The LinkedIn API requires specific permissions to post on behalf of an organization. If the app does not have the 'w_organization_social' scope, it will not be able to perform this action, leading to authentication failures.
fix_steps: Go to the LinkedIn Developer Portal and navigate to your app settings.
Submit your application for the Community Management App Review to gain access to the 'w_organization_social' scope.
Alternatively, in n8n, go to the LinkedIn credentials settings and toggle off the 'Organization Support' option.
agent_instruction: Submit your LinkedIn app for review or disable organization support in n8n credentials.
